summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Herion rebrand from TaxPilot. Successfully verified the complete rebrand to 'Herion' with tagline 'Precision. Control. Confidence.' across all application components including enhanced registration form, floating navbar with scroll animation, and confirmation dialogs for all sensitive actions.

design_issues.issue: Navbar opacity remains at 1 during scroll, animation may need fine-tuning

passed_tests: Backend API health check with Herion branding verification
Admin login with admin@aic.it / Admin123!
Herion API root endpoint shows correct branding: 'Herion API - Precision. Control. Confidence.'
All 19 backend API endpoints working correctly with Herion branding
Herion AI agent system prompts contain correct branding
Login page displays Herion branding with premium geometric H logo
Herion tagline 'Precision. Control. Confidence.' present in branding
Dashboard shows Herion branding in header and navigation
Floating navbar with scroll show/hide animation implemented
Enhanced registration form with all required fields (firstName, lastName, email, phone, clientType, vatNumber, fiscalCode, password, confirmPassword, privacy consent, terms consent)
Client type selection working (Privato/Professionista/Azienda)
VAT field appears only for Professionista and Azienda client types
VAT field correctly hidden for Privato client type
Password confirmation validation working correctly
Dashboard with Herion AI banner prominently displayed
Create practice with confirmation dialog working
Practice detail page with status change confirmation dialog
Herion AI execution with confirmation dialog
Logout confirmation dialog implemented
Premium rounded UI components throughout the application
Complete practice creation workflow with 3-step wizard
Practice summary correctly displays client type information
Navigation menu shows 'Herion AI' branding
All confirmation dialogs for sensitive actions working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (19/19 API endpoints working, all Herion branding verified)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major Herion branding elements working, enhanced registration form perfect, minor navbar animation issue)
